Dear Dr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Scientist at Alpha Innovations Pte Ltd, UEN: T12345678B. Your monthly gross salary will be SGD 12,500, payable on the last working day of each month. This offer is contingent upon the successful verification of your credentials and eligibility to work in Singapore.

Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by contacting our HR department at +65 6123 4567 or via email at hr@alphainnovations.sg. We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

Sincerely,

Mr. David Lee
